name: animeq
description: AnimeQ - A premium, ad-free anime streaming platform with offline viewing, recommendations, and low-latency global streaming.

scripts.serve: vite build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.deploy: bun run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=animeq --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=animeq --branch=preview --commit-dirty=true
